rules: Every non-ETF position must carry a complete contract BEFORE entry; a position without one is flagged VIOLATION at every audit.
Exit rules must match thesis type: event -> price+time, cycle -> cycle signals, structural -> thesis falsification, market ETF -> life events only.
Tilt protocol (main account): after any single realized loss > $25, no new discretionary trades for 24h; deposits never on a loss day.
Sandbox event trades are exempt from macro gates but never from contracts.
One event thesis lives in ONE account only (no mirroring sandbox positions into main).

contracts.thesis: Post-offering dislocation: $5B supply cleared at $27.50; market holding 9-16% above issue price = demand absorbed supply; capex payer->payee rotation tailwind.
contracts.invalidation: Daily close below 27.50 (issue price = floor of this price discovery round; break = thesis dead).
contracts.target: 34-36 (gap-fill zone); trim half at target, trail remainder.
contracts.time_limit: Review 2026-06-15 (depositary shares settle; last convert-hedge supply window). Hard review at FOMC 2026-06-17.

contracts.thesis: Defensive single name, target zone 80-82. Empirically underperforming on both red and green tapes -> thesis-watch.
contracts.invalidation: Daily close below 65.00 -> exit immediately (upgraded from 62 mental stop).
contracts.time_limit: Slot review at FOMC 2026-06-17: if still underperforming both directions, slot reallocates to AVGO-class candidates.

contracts.thesis: PENDING SIGNATURE: same event thesis as sandbox. NOTE: violates one-thesis-one-account rule; user to either adopt sandbox contract verbatim or exit. Default if unsigned by 2026-06-12 close: adopt sandbox contract (stop 27.50 close / target 34-36).
